title: Glowing Emissive Ores - Stay True
description: Adds emissive ore textures to the Stay True Resource Pack
body:
### Overview
This adds emissive ore textures to the [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true) Resource Pack

If you're using this with my [Glowing Emissive Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-emissive-ores/) Resource Pack then make sure to put "Glowing Emissive Ores - Stay True" above it

<details>
<summary>Don't want certain blocks being emissive?</summary>

If you don't like certain blocks being emissive for example coal ore then you can open up the resource pack and delete the emissive texture for that ore. I personally remove coal ore as it can look brown when emissive with shaders turned on. Here's an example:

- Navigate to "assets/minecraft/textures/block"
- Delete coal_ore_e (emissive textures end with "_e"

</details>

## ⚠️ Requirements:


<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>
  
<details>
<summary>NeoForge Requirements</summary>

### Option 1 (1.21 and 1.21.1)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) - (Makes Fabric mods work on NeoForge)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (NeoForge Version, 1.21.1+) or [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Forge Requirements</summary>

### Option 1 (1.16.5 to 1.21.1)
- [MoreMCMeta (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta)
- [MoreMCMeta Emissive Textures (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive)
### Option 2 (1.18.2 or 1.19.2)
- [Connectedness](https://modrinth.com/mod/connectedness)
- [Rubidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium)
### Option 3 (1.20.1, 1.21 or 1.21.1)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/connectedness)
- [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) - (Makes Fabric mods work on Forge)
### Option 4 (Not recommended)
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Fabric/Quilt Requirements</summary>

### Option 1 (Highly recommended) (1.18.2 to 1.21.5)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) – (Only supports Emissive textures on version 1.18.2 or higher)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - (Not needed but I highly recommend this)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - (Only required if you're using versions of Sodium lower than 0.6)

Note: versions of Sodium lower than 0.6 are known to cause Z-fighting issues when combined with Continuity.

### Option 2 (1.16.5 to 1.21.1)
- [MoreMCMeta (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta)
- [MoreMCMeta Emissive Textures (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive)
### Option 3 (Not recommended)
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
- [OptiFabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric)

</details>

</details>
